response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development with a focus on various technologies including AI-related ones, and has demonstrated experience in leading and innovating technical projects.
strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI infrastructure
Strong background in multiple programming languages and technologies
Demonstrated leadership and innovation in technical projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in cloud technologies
No explicit mention of experience in advising customers or partners on AI technologies
Limited direct experience in AI-powered product development
